basic_details.job_title: DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Sheopur (DLSA Sheopur)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Sheopur (DLSA Sheopur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Vehicle Driver Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 15-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Age Relaxation: Not Specified

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid Driving License, Driving Experience, Mechanic Qualification (Preference)
qualification.details: Vehicle Driver: 10th pass from any recognized board, Valid Driving License, Experience in driving all types of vehicles. Preference to qualified mechanics.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: mphc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver recruitment is 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Vehicle Driver post in the District Legal Services Authority Sheopur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard from a recognized board and possess a valid driving license. Preference will be given to those with mechanic qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Vehicle Driver post is 18 years. The maximum age limit is not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for this recruitment through the offline mode by sending their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a practical driving test and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 607/Establishment/DLSA/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Vehicle Driver position is on a contract basis.
